summary: Iteration 65 - Full Backend and Frontend Testing Complete. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Report generation with background task pattern working correctly - generates in <15s, polls until completion (~3 min). Frontend tests passed: landing page, login flow, dashboard, case detail with all tabs, Reports tab with Generate Report dialog, BarristerView with Print/PDF/Word buttons, mobile responsive hamburger menu.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Background report generation pattern with polling verified. Report generates in ~3 minutes due to Claude retries falling back to gpt-4o-mini. Frontend displays progress indicator during generation. BarristerView and ReportView have working PDF/Word/Print export buttons. Mobile hamburger menu works.
